# DnD5e Character Sheet Vendor Attribution

This LoTM system bundle includes vendored visual resources derived from the local Foundry DnD5e system for character-sheet theming fidelity.

## Source

- System: `dnd5e`
- Version baseline: `5.2.5`
- Local source path used during port: `C:\Users\dan\AppData\Local\FoundryVTT\Data\systems\dnd5e`

## Vendored Files

- `styles/assets/dnd5e/dnd5e.vendor.css` (ported from `dnd5e.css`)
- `styles/assets/dnd5e/ui/*`
- `styles/assets/dnd5e/fonts/*`
- `styles/assets/dnd5e/icons/*`
- `styles/fonts/modesto-condensed/*` (from local Foundry core fonts)

## License Notes

- Original DnD5e package license text is available at:
  - `C:\Users\dan\AppData\Local\FoundryVTT\Data\systems\dnd5e\LICENSE.txt`
- Original font licenses are preserved inside vendored font directories where provided.
- Vendored assets and CSS are included only to support the LoTM character sheet presentation and are not loaded as a runtime dependency on the installed `dnd5e` system.
